creator: mwlucas@michaelwlucas.com
text:
Created attachment 241163
tsample resolvconf.conf with two common configs

The base system contains no example of a working /etc/resolvconf.conf. No it's not critical, but an easily accessible functional example would have saved me twenty minutes.

Sticking the attached in /usr/share/examples/resolvconf/ might save others that time.
